name: Fort Stage
description: Large main-stage placeholder record. Stage-specific audience conditions should be verified before launch.

shade.summary: Unknown — verify fixed shade, audience tenting, and designated shade areas.

blankets.summary: Festival-wide 6×8-foot blanket maximum applies; stage-specific no-blanket zones still need verification.

chairs.summary: Festival-wide chair rules apply; no-chair-zone boundaries still need verification.

surface.summary: Unknown — verify grass, paved, and mixed audience areas.

accessibility.summary: Reserved accessibility area beside the sound board; seating is not supplied, and each patron may be accompanied by one guest because space is limited.

amenities: Accessibility route from entrance via paved road should be confirmed for 2026.
